overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban environment. The player moves from a covered overpass through a street sidewalk past a Med Center building, then into an open pedestrian plaza with benches, trees, and colorful graffiti on the pavement.

events.description: exits covered overpass into open sunlight and street environment

agents.ego_description: walking forward under the concrete overpass toward the street exit and crosswalk ahead

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving toward the camera on the street ahead

entered.detail: massive concrete and orange steel support beams of the overpass overhead
tall white building with red Med Center signage visible through the overpass exit
yellow striped crosswalk markings on the concrete ground
large holographic advertisement display visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens under a massive concrete overpass with orange structural supports. The camera walks forward toward a bright exit where a Med Center building is visible in the distance. A black SUV approaches on the street ahead as the player nears the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk alongside multi-lane road with street trees

events.description: emerging from shadow of overpass into bright direct sunlight
slight turn to follow the curving sidewalk path

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to the street, passing pedestrians and mature street trees

notable_agents.action: person in light jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk in same direction

entered.detail: black and white regulatory sign displaying speed limit 40
mature trees with dense green foliage lining the sidewalk edge
large orange structural pillars of the overpass running parallel to the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Exiting the overpass into bright sunlight, the camera walks along a city sidewalk next to a busy street. The Med Center building looms larger on the left while orange support pillars and street trees line the path. Pedestrians walk ahead as vehicles pass by on the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with public seating and colorful pavement graffiti

events.description: entering open pedestrian plaza from street sidewalk, ground changes to colored tiles
slowing down and turning to survey the plaza and view the overpass from the open area

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza passing people on benches, then slowing to look around at the surroundings

notable_agents.action: person sitting and relaxing on a yellow public bench

entered.detail: bright yellow and teal modern public seating pods with people resting
tall futuristic skyscraper under construction with cranes and scaffolding visible
modern curved multi-story building with horizontal architectural lines
small yellow and teal utility structure with graffiti and electrical panels
the overpass structure visible again in the distance as the camera turns around

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide pedestrian plaza with colorful graffiti on the pavement and modern yellow seating pods where people relax. A towering skyscraper under construction dominates the skyline ahead. The camera moves through the plaza, passing a yellow utility building, then turns to reveal the overpass structure visible again in the distance behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the shadowed depths of a concrete overpass into a bright, expansive urban plaza. It begins beneath massive orange structural supports, moving forward toward a bright exit where a Med Center building and an approaching black SUV are visible in the distance. As the camera exits the overpass into brilliant sunlight, the path shifts to a city sidewalk lined with street trees and orange pillars, passing pedestrians and flowing traffic. The scene then opens into a wide pedestrian plaza characterized by colorful graffiti on the pavement and modern yellow seating pods, with a towering skyscraper under construction dominating the skyline. Finally, the camera glides past a yellow utility building before turning to reveal the distant silhouette of the overpass structure from which it emerged.
